title: senecillis dux
intro: Senecillis dux, also known as Ground Ivy or Creeping Jenny, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family, characterized by its creeping stems and small, rounded leaves. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Ground Ivy include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Senecillis dux can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to soothe digestive issues and relieve anxiety.
